history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! Welcome to McDonald's. What type of food would you like today?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hi there, I'm ordering alone today. Could you recommend something hearty with no sugar? I'm 80 and quite hungry.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: For a hearty meal without added sugar, I recommend McVeggie®. It's a nutritious option for older adults. Would you like to add a drink or fries to your order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, please add fries. I avoid sugar.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I'll add the Our World Famous Fries®. Do you want to add a drink or dessert with your order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Could you recommend a sugar-free drink? I avoid sugar.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Black Coffee® is a sugar-free option. Would you like to add it to your order?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order will be: McVeggie®, Our World Famous Fries®, and Black Coffee®. Is this correct?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct. I avoid sugar so all these items should be safe.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: McVeggie®, Our World Famous Fries®, and Black Coffee®. All items are sugar-free as requested. Enjoy your meal!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you! I look forward to enjoying my meal.
